feedback.text: To whoever reads this, I fully believe in the new legislation proposed by this act as it tackles issues all too familiar to all of us. The only thing I would propose is the addition of stopping video game publishers from making their games unplayable after they've already been sold. This is not to suggest their games are to be kept perpetually supported, but rather for the customers to be given a way to do that themselves so that the games can remain functional. However, even if this issue is not added to the act, I still fully wish for it to be accepted!
